mechanism: Conscience is treated as a single inner voice
Guilt and shame are collapsed into one moral pain
possible_dampener: Distinguish act-focused guilt from self-focused shame
Separate action responsibility identity and possibility of repair

mechanism: Excessive guilt or shame attaches to trivial or impossible standards
possible_dampener: Use proportionality evidence trusted counsel and compassionate reality testing

mechanism: Serious harm produces little self-evaluative response
possible_dampener: Restore consequence visibility affected-person testimony and accountability

mechanism: The self redescribes harm as necessary normal or deserved
possible_dampener: Ask who benefits from the description and who is harmed by it

mechanism: Exposure is punished more than harm is repaired
possible_dampener: Create fair credible repair-oriented accountability systems

mechanism: Threat to self-image blocks truth and repair
possible_dampener: Build humility accountability and repair pathways
Require restitution changed behavior and follow-through

mechanism: People cannot see a survivable way to repair
possible_dampener: Create clear confession restitution and correction processes
